title: Munchly
description: This mod adds two consumables, Brine and Munchly.
body:
This mod introduces two new consumables, Brine and Munchly. Brine grants speed and poison effects, while Munchly gives wither, regeneration, and slowness effects, and spawns three hostile mobs that instantly start beating you with their fists, shouting phrases, and chasing you endlessly.
